_citation.derivation: Syllable-level bigram LM built by (1) splitting DEDR roots (Burrow+Emeneau 1984) into ~2-char CV syllables using greedy chunking, and (2) using clean literal_aksharas from Mahadevan 2003 Tamil-Brahmi corpus (filtering Cyrillic-contaminated OCR tokens). Bigrams are log-prob with Laplace smoothing. TB aksharas weighted 5× over DEDR.
